title: Repeatable Publishing SOP Plan
alignment_note: AG21Z boundary used the earlier title 'First Controlled Static Apply Decision Gate'. AG22A now aligns it to the agreed AG22 series: Repeatable Publishing SOP Plan.
supabase_reminder: Hybrid staged path remains selected: static/GitHub-controlled go-live first; Supabase/Auth/backend later only after explicit review and approval.
required_future_approval_phrase: Proceed with first controlled static apply
sop_objective: Define a repeatable, auditable, static-first publishing workflow for generated/manual articles without executing publication in AG22A.

sop_steps.name: Article Intake
sop_steps.work: Accept generated/manual/batch candidate article into controlled review path.

sop_steps.name: Content Readiness
sop_steps.work: Check title, category, summary, references, image credit, metadata and article body completeness.

sop_steps.name: Static File Preparation
sop_steps.work: Prepare intended static article path and file delta.

sop_steps.name: GitHub Write Readiness
sop_steps.work: Confirm token handling and write preconditions without creating token or writing.

sop_steps.name: Deployment and Smoke-test Readiness
sop_steps.work: Prepare deployment, article URL check, layout check, references check and rollback checklist.

sop_steps.name: Closure
sop_steps.work: Record result, blockers and learning after dry-run or controlled apply.
